title: WidePickUp
description: Expand your item pickup range! Configurable per-player in multiplayer. Press P to configure.
body:
# Features
Adjustable Range: Set from 0 (vanilla) to 32 blocks
Per-Player Settings: Each player has their own range in multiplayer
Easy Configuration:
Press P to open settings
Use Mod Menu
Edit config/widepickup.json
Server-Safe: Admins can limit max range

Optional: Mod Menu for in-game config

# Multiplayer
With mod: Your setting syncs to server
Without mod: Uses server default
Server config: Set maxHorizontalPickupRange in config file
